privileged_info_summary: The maintenance_tracker task is a medium-difficulty spreadsheet task that generates 18 synthetic maintenance requests with dates from the past 30 days, randomly assigned to apartments 101-112 with statuses distributed as 40% Open, 30% In Progress, 30% Completed. The task requires adding date formulas using TODAY(), conditional formatting on multiple columns, and summary statistics using COUNT/COUNTIF/COUNTIFS functions. The verifier checks 6 criteria with a 70% pass threshold (4-5+ criteria passing). One documented discrepancy: README Expected Results section incorrectly references A2:A21 (implying 20 data rows), but the setup script actually generates 18 data rows (A2:A19); the verifier correctly checks A2:A20 to handle potential edge cases.
